item.title: Depression may be the brain’s early warning sign of Parkinson’s or dementia
item.description: Depression in older adults may sometimes signal the early stages of Parkinson’s disease or Lewy body dementia. Researchers found that depression often...

item.title: Your cat’s purr says more than you think
item.description: Your cat’s purr may say more about who they are than their meow ever could. Scientists discovered that purrs are stable and uniquely identifiable, whi...

item.title: This ancient animal was one of the first to eat plants on land
item.description: Hundreds of millions of years ago, the first animals to crawl onto land were strict meat-eaters, even as plants had already taken over the landscape. ...

item.title: Scientists just made living blood vessels on a chip that act like real ones
item.description: Blood vessels twist, branch, narrow, and balloon in ways that dramatically affect how blood flows — but most lab models have long treated them like st...

item.title: Scientists discover how life experiences rewrite the immune system
item.description: Why does the same virus barely faze one person while sending another to the hospital? New research shows the answer lies in a molecular record etched ...
